overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest at night in video game footage. The player follows a narrow dirt path illuminated by a flashlight, passing rock formations and dense vegetation in a continuous forward movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with rock wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path, illuminating the way with a handheld flashlight

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with layered texture running alongside the path
thick tree trunk with rough bark standing close to the path edge
narrow winding trail covered with brown dirt and scattered stones
thick green foliage and shrubs lining the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight beam. A large rock formation runs along the left side while a prominent tree stands on the right. The path is surrounded by dense bushes and vegetation.

events.description: large rock formation on left exits view, entering open forest section without rocky walls

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path through denser woodland vegetation

entered.detail: tall trees visible in the distance through the darkness beyond the path
dense overhead tree cover blocking the night sky

segments.scene_description: Having passed the rock formation, the trail continues through dense forest. The path remains narrow and winding, surrounded by thick vegetation and scattered trees visible in the flashlight beam ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest path with sparse trees

events.description: rocky terrain reappears on left side and distinctive bare tree becomes visible on right

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the forest where the terrain becomes rockier and more open

entered.detail: rocky boulders and stone outcroppings along the left side of the path
tall tree with sparse foliage and visible light-colored bark

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a rockier section of forest with boulders appearing on the left. A distinctive bare tree with light bark stands on the right side of the path. The vegetation becomes slightly less dense as the path continues deeper into the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a narrow forest trail at night, transitioning from a densely vegetated path into a rockier, more open woodland. It begins with a flashlight beam cutting through the dark, illuminating a large rock formation on the left and a prominent tree on the right. As the camera moves forward, the trail winds deeper into the forest, surrounded by thick bushes and scattered trees that flicker into view. The scene then shifts as the path enters a rockier section where boulders reappear on the left and a distinctive bare tree with light bark stands to the right. Finally, the vegetation thins slightly as the camera continues its steady progression further into the darkness.
